headings.strategy: Tech/Clean. Tracking tight (tracking-tight) for large text > 32px. No generic Inter.

body.strategy: Sterile and objective body for dense text legibility.

mono.strategy: CRITICAL: Used heavily for technical data - ports, IPs, domains, container hashes, env vars, and live logs.

grids.dashboard_grid: Mode B (High Density Grid). Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap: gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized.
grids.alignment: Strict left-alignment for dense data. Optical alignment for icons within buttons.

layouts.sidebar: Standard 240px-280px fixed sidebar. Uses a distinct, darker border to separate from main content area.
layouts.container: No text centering for the app container. Use max-w-full and let the grid structure the layout.
layouts.header: Solid background headers with 1px bottom border. No fully transparent headers over content.

component name.cards: Cardless or max 4px radius (rounded-sm). 1px solid border (border-white/10). No soft box-shadows. Flat backgrounds.
component name.buttons: Sharp edges. Primary uses white bg with black text, hover to slightly gray. Secondary/Ghost for standard actions.
component name.logs_viewer: Custom Terminal-style component. Monospace, streaming. Padding p-4, bg-black, overflow-y-auto. Status colors apply to log text.
component name.inputs: Shadcn inputs/Select. bg-transparent, border-white/20, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white focus:border-white.
component name.tables: Dense. Border-collapse look. Subtle right/bottom borders for each cell to expose the skeleton.

visual enhancers.borders: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Expose the skeleton of the UI.
visual enhancers.surfaces: Retro-Futurism/Terminal Look for logs and code blocks. Flat solid surfaces for forms.
visual enhancers.textures: Subtle noise on auth screen overlay.

motion.hover_states: Slight lift or border color change (border-white/30). Ensure text contrast increases on hover.
motion.animations: Micro-interactions. Background tracing beam effect for active 'building' states. Staggered list entrance.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA contrast guidelines. Text over images must have strong dark scrims.
accessibility.focus: Focus states must have HIGHER contrast than default state, not lower.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='deploy-button').

media.icons: lucide-react. Use specific technical icons (server, cpu, hard-drive, activity, github).

3d libraries.charts: Recharts for simple server resource utilization (CPU, RAM). Use flat line charts with no fill gradient, matching accent colors.

login_background.description: Modern server rack with blue lighting. Apply heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80) to use as login screen background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build an Admin Login page using the provided background image with an overlay. Use Shadcn forms.
Build a Dashboard with a sidebar navigation. Central view features resource stats (CPU, RAM, Disk) in bento grid, and a list of running/stopped projects.
Implement Project detail view with configuration (GitHub URL, branch, port mapping, domain, env vars).
Include an interactive Live Logs viewer (styled like a terminal window with monospace font).
Strictly follow the color palette provided. Green for running, Yellow/Amber for building, Red for error.
Implement the 'Add new project' wizard logically, handling Repo -> Build Config -> Domain/SSL -> Deploy.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
Do not use generic Inter for headings.
Create depth through layered z-index hierarchy, but keep styling brutalist.
No soft UI or heavy shadows. Use 1px sharp borders.
Ensure dark themes do not use muddy gray transparency.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
